Staff of the Earthcrafter  
 

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 48
DMG: 21 Dmg Bonus: 162
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +15 HP: +100 MANA: +50
Effect: Drones of Doom (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 40
WT: 7.5 Size: LARGE
Class: DRU
Race: HUM ELF HEF HFL DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

▲ Page top
ToV/Springwood club vs. Staff of the earth caller
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2002 at 9:16 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592758651548
Sage
56 posts
I am currently wielding a springwood club and a testament of vanear. A total of 15wis for much much less pp. This is a druid only item and it procs at lvl 40 and by then all of you should already have the spell drones of doom.... the 100hp and 50mana is a nice addition but if you dont want to waste all your pp go with the springwood and testament.
▲ Page top
How Proc?
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2002 at 11:14 PM Rating: Decent
talaxia
62 posts
Is this a triggered proc or battle proc?
▲ Page top
RE: How Proc?
QuoteReply
# Jul 19 2002 at 12:02 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252295035
View User Forum
Scholar
98 posts
The proc is a combat proc. That's what the "random" means above. It's the same proc as on the ES vambraces. If you're buying this weapon for the proc, buy the ES vambs instead. Same proc, triggered. I currently own three items with the same proc: this staff, ES vambs, and my Thurgadin bracer. The Thurgadin bracer would be the best for the proc, as it is triggered as well and the cast time is (slightly) less than on the ES vambs (7.5 seconds as opposed to 8.0 seconds). This staff is helpful if you're crushing a mob when it turns to run. Other than that, if you're like me, you don't have 2hb really worked on, so you don't hit for much or hit often.

All in all, a very nice staff for the stats. 15 wis and 100 mana comes in real handy very often. Not to mention that the 100hp bonus on the staff has saved my life several times already.
▲ Page top

__DEL__1592759287357
View User Forum
18 posts
I guess I got lucky then. I bought it off a vendor in Bazaar on the Cazic-Thule server for 2500pp. It is a sweet weapon and It replaced my cone of mystics and testament of vanear. The 100HP is a sweet bonus I think!
▲ Page top
Not Bad
QuoteReply
# Jan 06 2002 at 10:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757457459
Scholar
18 posts
Since this is 2HB it replaces primary and secondary, ok we got that. With the effect of drones of doom it will also replace ES arms, so it will free up the arm slot for an improved stat item. I have cone of the mystics and a book of obulous though, so I believe I would lose mana with this item. I could put a better item in my arm slot, and the 100 hp would help. I would like this staff except for the fact that my 2hb is 1 and I would have to train that for a long time :(
▲ Page top
RE: Not Bad
QuoteReply
# Feb 16 2002 at 3:57 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591761991555
Scholar
300 posts
Why would this replace the ES vams? The vambraces are clickable drones of doom. This is a proc. I don't know many Druids willing to run in and wail away trying to get this thing to proc.
▲ Page top
RE: Not Bad
QuoteReply
# Jan 11 2002 at 4:17 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771207129
8 posts
Ok I got one today off Nagafen, the stats are not bad and I can do 49 damage with it per hit. granted the Drones is a proc not triggerd I still would use the ES vambracers for the triggerd effect, no way do I want to pound on somthing waiting for it to proc while getting the crap beat out of me. Ill still keep it, it did replace my 2 hand items but its a even replacement too bad the items are no drop or I could have gotten some extra cash to buy my ES vambracers :). allso I seems to get aggro allot more with this item then others, I have a feeling that each hit is like a cast on the mob, so im just racking up aggro and that DoT is a LvL34 Dot and does aggro a bit.

QuoteReply
# Sep 16 2001 at 6:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755151127
13 posts
ok, it may say 15 wis, but it adds 50 mana, also equivalent to 5 wis, so, this is a 20 wis item once you reach lvl 50
▲ Page top
Not I
QuoteReply
# Aug 20 2001 at 5:38 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This item for 25k, rofl. Think about it. It is 2h so it has to replace the secondary slot too. I have normal gear than can be achieved at lvl 40, the Testament of Vaneer (spelling?) and Dark Ember. Combined they give you 15 wisdom and 30mana. At lvl 45 I started using the ES Vambraces. They are a "triggered" drones of doom. The two buyable items are about 7-8K, and the testament is a quest. Much less expensive than 25K.

Whoever gets this item will probably end up in their bank, since they will be unable to sell it for what they think it is worth.

Kamon
Lvl 48 Druid
Bertoxx
▲ Page top
Drones of Doom
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2001 at 8:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757652085
81 posts
Drones of Doom is a high level druid spell that is like creeping crud, it is a dot spell. That means it does damage over time. This particular dot spell is very good. It does a lot of damage/seconds. Not sure on the exact ratio, but its a lot.

Shallana Wolfbane
Ranger of the 23rd snowfall
▲ Page top
RE: Drones of Doom
QuoteReply
# Aug 15 2001 at 12:09 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593965874600
View User Forum
Sage
268 posts
The effect is a 360 point dot over the course of 1 minute. So once the proc lands, it does 36 damage a tick. :)
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 14 2002 at 5:07 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Wow...Amazing to see someone in posts that has some common sense, hes exactly right 360DOt 36dmg per tick, tick = 6 seconds RL, soooo. 6dmg per second, not bad for a proc :) /BTW my friends, look at your friggin stuff before u post Naggy dropped it WHOOOHOO <gay>, Naggy does not drop this, naggy drops Heirophants Crook, +9str +9dex +2wis procs EArthquake..... and if anyone on Drinal wants Either, both are RARE or VERY RARE drop status, Contack Jonahelm (proud member of Dragonring, and officer in Drakering, i have both Staff of the Earthcrafter and Heirophants on alts, PST if u wanna buy one :)
